memoryArtifacts.headline: Coat of arms of the Marquess of Huntly, Chief of Clan Gordon
memoryArtifacts.description:
Coat of arms of the Marquess of Huntly, Chief of Clan Gordon
Blazon: Quarterly 1st Azure three boar's heads couped Or langued Gules (Gordon) 2nd Or three lion's heads erased Gules langued Azure (Lordship of Badenoch) 3rd Or 3 crescents within a double tressure flory counter-flory Gules (Seton) 4th Azure three fraises Argent (Fraser). ref: houseofgordon.com
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alexander_Gordon,_1st_Earl_of_Huntly

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Seton Lord Gordon於1382年1月出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾時，他的父親Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton35歲，母親Janet Fleming31歲。他於1401年與Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1440年8月31日在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利享年58歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Seton Lord Gordon于1382年1月出生在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾时，他的父亲Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton35岁，母亲Janet Fleming31岁。他于1401年与Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1440年8月31日在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利享年58岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Seton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Seton Lord Gordon was born in January 1382, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton, was 35 and his mother, Janet Fleming, was 31. He married Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon in 1401, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. He died about 31 August 1440, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 58, and was buried in Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Seton Lord Gordon est né en janvier 1382, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Janet Fleming, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon en 1401, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé environ 31 août 1440, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Aberdeenshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Seton Lord Gordon im Januar 1382 in Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton 35 und seine Mutter Janet Fleming 31. Er hat 1401 in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb um 31. August 1440 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland und wurde in Aberdeenshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Seton Lord Gordon è nato il nel gennaio 1382 nel Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Janet Fleming, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon nel 1401, nel Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì circa 31 agosto 1440, nel Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Seton Lord Gordonが1382年1月にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William Seton 1st Lord Setonは35歳，母Janet Flemingは31歳であった。1401年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーでElizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は約1440年8月31日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーで58歳で死去し，スコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Seton Lord Gordon(이)가 1382년 1월 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Fleming(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1401년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1440년 8월 31일 스컷랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 압르디실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Seton Lord Gordon nasceu em janeiro de 1382, em Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Janet Fleming, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon em 1401, em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 31 de agosto de 1440, em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Seton Lord Gordon родился январь 1382 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Fleming, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon в 1401 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер около 31 августа 1440 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Seton Lord Gordon nació en enero de 1382, en Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Seton 1st Lord Seton, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Janet Fleming, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon en 1401, en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 31 de agosto de 1440, en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Aberdeenshire, Scotland.
